figures.caption: Fig. 1. Overview of the EC-HFRL framework.

Fig. 3. Replay exposure and key experience diagnostics under fixed experience budgets. (a)(b) show results for PD-Chem and (c)(d) for SD-Fire. Left: relationship between replay exposure (UCR) and key experience admission (KER). Right: relationship between key experience admission (KER) and key TD contribution (KTC).
Fig. 2. UCR under different learner participation levels K and minibatch sizes b in the Chemical and Fire environments.
Fig. 4. Performance–energy trade-off across different (K, b) configurations. Bars represent success rate, while the blue curve indicates the corresponding system-level energy cost.
